chunks.text: Information for Current Graduate Students - EECS at Berkeley. Whether you’re pursuing a Ph.D., M.S., or M.Eng. degree in EECS, this page serves as your hub for essential academic resources, advising contacts, and connect with your program advisor for personalized support throughout your graduate journey.
chunks.question: What is the purpose of the EECS graduate student page?
chunks.answer: Hub for academic resources and advising contacts.

chunks.text: Graduate Advisors: Judy Smithson, M.Ed, Director of Graduate Affairs, EE Graduate Advisor (She/Her/Ella), 217 Cory, +1 (510) 643-8347, grads-ee@berkeley.edu. Continuing Student matters for graduate students studying electrical engineering and computer science.
chunks.question: Who is the EE graduate advisor?

chunks.text: Carissa Caloud, CS Graduate Advisor, 367 Soda, +1 (510) 664-4436, grads-cs@berkeley.edu. Continuing Student matters for graduate students studying computer science.
chunks.question: What is Carissa Caloud's role?

chunks.text: Michael Sun, Masters Degrees Advisor, 215 Cory, +1 (510) 642-8107, M.Eng: grads-meng@berkeley, 5th Year MS: grads-fifthyrms@berkeley. Continuing Student matters for Masters students in the 5th Year MS, MS-only, and MEng programs.
chunks.question: Which programs does Michael Sun advise?

chunks.text: Tiffany Sun, Graduate Student Services Advisor, 253 Cory, M.Eng: grads-meng@berkeley, 5th Year MS: grads-fifthyrms@berkeley. Continuing Student matters for Masters students in the 5th Year MS, MS-only, and MEng programs.
chunks.question: What is Tiffany Sun's title?

chunks.text: Admissions and GSI Staff: Glenna Anton, Ph.D., CS Graduate Admissions Coordinator, 215 Cory, +1 (510) 642-6285, ganton@eecs. CS Graduate admissions; admissions database; lower division CS GSI assignments; student support.
chunks.question: What does Glenna Anton handle?
chunks.answer: CS graduate admissions and GSI assignments.

chunks.text: Patrick Hernan, EE Graduate Admissions Coordinator, Fellowships, and GSI Coordinator, 215 Cory, +1 (510) 642-9265, hernan@eecs. EE graduate admissions, fellowships; EE GSI assignments upper division and graduate CS GSI assignments.
chunks.question: What are Patrick Hernan's responsibilities?
chunks.answer: EE admissions, fellowships, and GSI assignments.

chunks.text: EECS Grad Events & Deadlines (CalNet Login Required). Know your Rights: It’s important to know your rights if you’re ever approached by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Stay informed and prepared—visit our resources page for more information.
chunks.question: What should graduate students know about ICE?
